title: Joan the Maid 2: The Prisons
original_title: Jeanne la Pucelle II: Les Prisons
overview: Jeanne has succeeded in lifting the siege of Orléans and Charles has been crowned King of France. However, she is injured in an attempt to take Paris, weakening her position at court. Captured by the enemy and put on trial, she finds both her life and the sanctity of her body at stake.
